name: IntroVideoHardVisible
notes: The intro video is visible from the user tap, has no loading copy/bar, keeps a minimum 3-second hold, and the lobby/settings/popup copy fit is tightened across screens.
label: Hard-visible intro video and deep UI sweep
description: Game start uses only the intro video as the loading surface. It becomes visible immediately from the tap, remains for at least 3 seconds, and stays until assets are ready.
